creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
/usr/local/share/applications/waterfox.desktop
contained a few mentions of firefox/Firefox. I manually edited the file to include: 

Name=Waterfox web browser

Exec=waterfox %U
Icon=waterfox
Exec=waterfox -new-window
Exec=waterfox -private-window

(Things seem to be fine, with those changes, touch wood.)
